author: han0110
content: yeah mainly by Ethproofs, but those you mentioned haven't published their distributed prover yet.

author: chotuchaiwala
content: how does ethproofs use these zkvms on multi GPU systems if the vendors don't support it?

author: han0110
content: I think the vendors operate their own closed source cluster and submit the proof and a self-reported proving time to Ethproofs.
